debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : Field K
inst✝² : Field L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : Finite K
⊢ IsCyclotomicExtension {n | ↑n ≠ 0} K L ↔ IsAlgClosure K L

failed_attempts:
rintro rfl
          simp_all
        apply h.splits_of_prime_pow this
    exact inferInstance
  · intro h
    haveI : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_isAlgClosure
    exact inferInstance

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite
      exact h
    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite
      exact h
    exact this

apply splits_of_card_pow_sub_one (Set.univ : Set ℕ) _ _
          · simp [hn]
          · exact h.splits_X_pow_sub_one
        exact this
    exact inferInstance
  · intro h
    haveI : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure
    exact inferInstance
exact this

exact h.splits
    exact inferInstance

apply IsAlgClosure.of_splits
      · intro p hp
        obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := Finite.exists_card_eq K
        have : (p : Polynomial K).Splits (algebraMap K L) := by
          apply splits_of_cyclotomic_extension
          exact h
        exact this
      · exact Algebra.isAlgebraic_iff_isIntegral.mpr (by infer_instance)
    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure
      exact h
    exact this

exact isAlgClosure_iff_isAlgebraic_and_splits.mp ⟨h.isAlgebraic, fun p hp => ?_⟩
    exact this p hp
  · intro h
    have := h.isAlgebraic
    have := h.isSplittingField
    refine ⟨fun n hn => ?_, fun p hp => ?_⟩
    · exact (isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite_field K L n hn).2
    · exact this p hp

exact isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finiteField
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    exact isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finiteField

exact isAlgClosure_of_finiteDimensional_of_normal (by infer_instance) (by infer_instance)
  · haveI := h.normal
    haveI := h.separable
    exact isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure

apply IsAlgClosure.of_normal_of_separable
      · exact h.normal
      · exact h.separable
    exact inferInstance
  · intro h
    haveI : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_isAlgClosure
      exact h
    exact inferInstance

rintro rfl
          simp_all
        have : SplittingField.splits (algebraMap K L) p := by
          apply splits_of_cyclotomic_extension h
          use n
          simp_all
        exact this
    exact inferInstance
  · intro h
    apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_isAlgClosure
    exact h

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite

have := h.splits
    exact isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure

exact isAlgClosure_of_finiteDimensional h
  · haveI := h.algebraic
    exact isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure h

exact h.isSplittingField
    exact ‹_›

apply isAlgClosure_iff.mpr
      constructor
      · exact AlgHom.isIntegral_iff_isAlgebraic.mpr (isIntegral_of_finite_extension h)
      · intro M _ _ _
        apply IntermediateField.exists_algHom
        exact h
    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure
      exact h
    exact this

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite

intro n hn
      haveI : CharP K p := FiniteField.charP K
      have : ¬p ∣ n := by
        intro hpn
        rw [← Nat.cast_eq_zero_iff, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff] at hpn
        exact hn hpn
      exact IsCyclotomicExtension.of_algClosure K L n this
    exact IsCyclotomicExtension.sUnion_of_directed {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} this (by
      refine' ⟨1, by simp⟩; rintro n hn m hm; refine' ⟨n * m, _⟩; simp [hn, hm])

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite_field h
  · haveI := Classical.propDecidable
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite_field h

apply IsAlgClosure.of_isCyclotomicExtension
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_isAlgClosure

apply isAlgClosure_iff.mpr
      constructor
      · exact Algebra.isAlgebraic_of_finite
      · intro M _ _ _ _
        apply IntermediateField.exists_lift
        exact h
    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
      apply isCyclotomicExtension_iff.mpr
      intro n hn
      have : (n : K) ≠ 0 := hn
      have : IsPrimitiveRoot (1 : K) n := by
        simp_all
      exact isPrimitiveRoot_isIntegral this
    exact this

apply IsAlgClosure.of_isCyclotomicExtension
      exact h
    exact inferInstance
  · intro h
    haveI : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite

    haveI := h
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite

have : CharP K (ringChar K) := inferInstance
        have : ringChar K = p := by
          obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := Finite.exists_prime (by infer_instance)
          exact hp
        have : ¬(p : K) = 0 := by
          simp [CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff, this]
        have : n % p ≠ 0 := by
          contrapose! this
          simp [Nat.cast_eq_zero_iff, this]
        exact h.splittingField_cyclotomic n
      · exact h.isAlgebraic
    exact inferInstance

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite

apply isAlgClosure_iff.mpr

    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by

      exact h
    exact this

apply isAlgClosure_of_isCyclotomicExtension_of_finite
  · intro h
    haveI := h
    apply isCyclotomicExtension_of_isAlgClosure_of_finite

exact (h.isAlgebraic.splittingField).isSplittingField_of_cyclotomic this
    exact ‹_›

apply isAlgClosure_iff.2
      constructor
      · exact h.isAlgebraic
      · intro M _ _ _
        apply (isAlgClosure_iff.1 h).2 M
    exact this
  · have : IsCyclotomicExtension {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} K L := by
